title: Floral Festive Dutch Onion Skewers
description: Crispy, lightly charred onion cubes marinated in a fragrant Dutch-inspired herb blend, garnished with edible flowers for a burst of color and a low‑carb twist.
instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium‑high heat (about 200°C / 400°F).
Thread each onion cube onto metal or soaked wooden skewers (about 6–8 per skewer).
In a small bowl whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, dried thyme, smoked paprika, garlic powder, salt, pepper, and dried lavender (if using).
Place the skewer bundle in a shallow dish and pour the herb mixture over, turning to coat all sides; let marinate for 15 minutes.
Remove the skewers from the marination dish, letting excess drip off, and place them on the preheated grill.
Cook for 3–4 minutes per side, until the onions are lightly charred and tender; total grilling time ~8 minutes.
Transfer the skewers to a serving platter and drizzle any remaining sauce from the grill pan over them.
Sprinkle the edible flowers on top, serve warm, and enjoy the floral sparkle of Dutch tradition.
